goal: Add a side-effect-free audit authority builder that authorizes runtime patch permit consume execution receipt record audit artifacts without runtime execution, audit writes, patches, server/route mutation, or durable persistence.
scope_out: Do not write audits, perform durable receipt writes, consume permits, execute runtime work, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write runtime artifacts.
claims: Runtime patch consume execution receipt record audit preflight artifacts can be authorized without runtime execution.
Audit authority id, authorized-by ref, and expiry ref are required.
Audit writes, runtime execution, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, permit consumption, and durable persistence remain false.
assumptions: Actual audit writes and runtime execution require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing audit authority id, and blocked preflight cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, diff-check, and full builder tests pass.
stop_conditions: Audit write, durable receipt write, permit consumption, runtime execution, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or runtime write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-161 produced side-effect-free runtime patch consume execution receipt record audit preflight artifacts.
